name: Buttermilk Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon salt (omit for low sodium diet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly in a blender at low speed for 30 seconds.
2. Transfer the dressing to a pint jar and cover tightly.
3. Refrigerate for a few hours before using.
Values per serving: CHO 3 gm., PRO 2 gm., FAT 0, Calories 18, Sodium 160 mg. (with salt). Food Exchange per serving: Up to 3 tablespoons may be considered "free." 1 serving = 3 tablespoons.
